props.title: Beautiful Landing Pages, Built with Blocks
props.subtitle: Compose stunning, theme-agnostic pages using a library of DaisyUI-powered blocks. One JSON file. Infinite layouts.

props.title: Everything You Need
props.subtitle: A complete toolkit for building beautiful, performant landing pages without writing a single line of CSS.

features.title: Theme-Agnostic
features.description: Built entirely with DaisyUI semantic classes. Swap themes in one line — no color hardcoding ever.

features.title: Blazing Fast
features.description: Astro 5 ships zero JavaScript by default. Static, optimized, and ready for production from day one.

features.title: Composable Blocks
features.description: Each section is an independent, typed block. Mix and match in JSON — no code changes required.

features.title: Fully Responsive
features.description: Every block is mobile-first. Hamburger menus, stacked layouts, and fluid grids — all built in.

features.title: Type-Safe
features.description: TypeScript interfaces for every block prop. Your editor catches errors before your users do.

features.title: Deploy Anywhere
features.description: Static output means you can deploy to Cloudflare Pages, Vercel, Netlify, or a plain CDN.

slides.title: Hero Section
slides.description: Full-width heroes with kicker, dual CTAs, and optional image layouts.

slides.title: Features Grid
slides.description: Configurable 2-4 column feature cards with icons, titles, and descriptions.

slides.title: Stats Section
slides.description: Horizontal stat bars that stack vertically on mobile — DaisyUI stats component.

stats.label: Lines of Config
stats.description: To build a full landing page

props.title: Ready to Build Your Landing Page?
props.subtitle: Fork the seed, edit the JSON, and ship. It really is that simple.

props.title: Get in Touch
props.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll get back to you shortly.
